Text.Main: Hi there!  I'm Jacob, the local CRS agent.  If there were mission maps done right now I'd totally offer you race missions.  Come back later and see what you're missing!

Ha, it's just not your day is it, []?  You probably thought this here wheel store is open, but the truth is we've made a massive paradigm shift here in Borderton and the wheelstore hasn't caught up to this new way of doing business.  Come back when the new invisistore system is in place and I'll be happy to sell you cra-- I mean sell you fine quality tires.
What sort of upgrade would you like?
